title: APC UPS SNMP Output Load Approaching Rated Capacity
dataSources: `index=power|cooling|environment` · `sourcetype="snmp:apc:ups"` (APC PowerNet / AirIR / ATS / NetBotz OIDs per deployment)
app: Splunk Connect for SNMP (SC4SNMP) or SNMP Modular Input; APC PowerNet-MIB / AirIR-MIB field extractions
spl:
index=power sourcetype="snmp:apc:ups" earliest=-4h
| eval load_pct=tonumber(coalesce(upsAdvOutputLoad, upsOutputPercentLoad, ""))
| where load_pct>80
| stats latest(load_pct) as load_pct latest(_time) as seen by ups_name
description: Running UPS near nameplate kVA shortens battery runtime nonlinearly and risks overload alarms during transfer.
value: Drives rack power rebalancing before refresh cycles.
implementation: (1) Set warning 80%, critical 90%. (2) Join to PDU data for attribution.
grandmaExplanation: We watch the physical data center for power, cooling, environment, and physical access.
knownFalsePositives: Capacity alerts during planned hardware refreshes, scheduled rack moves, or new deployments.
